title: Dependency Graph Report
description: Produced by codebase-dependency-grapher. Directed graph of module-level imports — internal-module-to-internal-module edges plus internal-module-to-external-dependency edges. Consumed by codebase-architecture-reconstructor to identify layering violations, cycles, and orphan modules.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the scan started.

project_dir.description: Absolute path of the project root scanned.

primary_language.description: Profile name from <project>/.language_profile.json. Null when no stamp is present or the stamp is the no-match sentinel.

cycle_count.description: Number of strongly-connected components with size > 1. Null when the scanner did not compute SCCs.

nodes.description: One entry per unique module identifier. Internal nodes carry a path; external nodes do not.

edges.description: Directed edges from importer to imported. Deduplicated by (source, target, kind) tuple.

notes.description: Human-readable observations: unresolved imports, ambiguous module paths, language-specific limitations.

id.description: Stable identifier — language-canonical module path, e.g. 'src.app.routes' (Python), 'src/app/routes' (JS/TS).

path.description: Project-relative file path. Required for internal nodes; omitted for external nodes.

kind.description: import = static; dynamic = runtime resolution (import(), __import__(), require() in function body); reexport = pass-through (export from / pub use).
